title: Event Surface
description: Structured context for the surface where an event source or logged event originated. Use this when the flat `action_source` is too coarse, such as a creator channel, social profile, podcast feed, newsletter list, or another owned platform property. `category` is a closed vocabulary so buyers can reason generically; `property_type` and `namespace` are open strings so new platforms and property shapes do not require a schema change. The flat `action_source` remains for backward compatibility. When `category` matches an ActionSource value, producers SHOULD set `action_source` to the same value. When `category` is `owned_property`, producers SHOULD keep the most compatible flat `action_source` for legacy consumers, commonly `system_generated` for platform-native events or `other` when no closer value applies.

category.description: Generic surface category. `owned_property` covers durable creator or brand-controlled properties hosted by a platform, such as channels, profiles, feeds, lists, podcasts, or playlists.

enumDescriptions.owned_property: Event occurred on or against a durable creator or brand-controlled platform property
enumDescriptions.app: Event occurred in a mobile or desktop app
enumDescriptions.offline: Event occurred offline or was imported from offline data
enumDescriptions.phone_call: Event originated from a phone call
enumDescriptions.chat: Event originated from a chat conversation
enumDescriptions.email: Event originated from an email interaction
enumDescriptions.in_store: Event occurred at a physical retail location
enumDescriptions.system_generated: Event was generated by an automated system

property_type.description: Open vocabulary describing the kind of property, for example `channel`, `profile`, `feed`, `list`, `podcast`, `playlist`, or `newsletter`. Required by convention when `category` is `owned_property`; optional for other categories.

namespace.description: Platform, publisher, or system namespace for the property, such as `video_platform`, `short_video_app`, `audio_service`, or a seller-defined namespace. This is intentionally not an enum.

property_id.description: Optional identifier for the property within `namespace`.
